scripts.check: node --check plugins/codex-pushdeer-notifier/scripts/pushdeer-lib.mjs && node --check plugins/codex-pushdeer-notifier/scripts/pushdeer-notify.mjs && node --check plugins/codex-pushdeer-notifier/scripts/pushdeer-notify-event.mjs && node --check plugins/codex-pushdeer-notifier/scripts/pushdeer-stop-hook.mjs && node --check plugins/codex-pushdeer-notifier/scripts/setup-pushdeer-key.mjs && node --check scripts/install.mjs && node --check scripts/uninstall.mjs && node --check scripts/doctor.mjs && node --check scripts/check-models.mjs && node --check scripts/model-utils.mjs && node --check bin/codex-pushdeer.mjs
scripts.notify:dry-run: CODEX_PUSHDEER_DRY_RUN=1 node plugins/codex-pushdeer-notifier/scripts/pushdeer-notify.mjs --title 已完成PushDeer本地通知脚本dryrun验证当前不会真实发送消息
